hooks.command: bash -c "if echo \"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -qE '(Controller|Resource|Endpoint)\.(java|ts|py|go)'; then echo 'API Consolidation: Modifying an endpoint file. Run /api-consolidation:validate-apis after changes.'; fi"

bash -c "if echo \"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -qE '(Controller|Resource|Endpoint|router|route)\.(java|ts|js|py|go)'; then echo 'API Consolidation: New endpoint file detected. Run /api-consolidation:discover-apis to update inventory.'; fi"

bash -c "if [ -f .claude/docs/api-issues.md ]; then CRITICAL=$(grep -ci 'critical' .claude/docs/api-issues.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ \"$CRITICAL\" -gt 0 ]; then echo \"API Consolidation: $CRITICAL critical API issues remain. Run /api-consolidation:fix-apis before committing.\"; fi; fi"

bash -c "if echo \"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -qE '(Controller|Resource|Endpoint|router|route)\.(java|ts|js|py|go)'; then echo 'API Consolidation: Endpoint file modified. API inventory may be stale.'; fi"
bash -c "if echo \"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -qE 'api-(inventory|issues|consolidation)|consolidation-plan'; then echo 'API Consolidation: Report updated.'; fi"
bash -c "echo 'API Consolidation: Agent completed. Check .claude/docs/ for reports.'"
